subject: Cohortly
value: Build a music smart-link and fan-intelligence platform that combines the strongest utility of Linkfire and Songwhip: universal music routing, clean artist landing pages, listener attribution, campaign tracking and audience intelligence.

subject: Cohortly
value: The project is stagnant but not abandoned. Neither existing repository satisfies Mandla. A fresh implementation may replace both while preserving useful product thinking and components.

value.MandlaLee/cohortly: Private Next.js-oriented attempt with analytics components; unsatisfactory and incomplete as a reproducible product
value.MandlaLee/Cohortly-Deepseek: Earlier static browser prototype with dashboard, create-link, tracking and about pages
value.MandlaLee/Kingship-Links: Early experiment using Kingship Christian Centre as the test subject; retained separately for a future Kingship follow subdomain

subject: Cohortly
value: Design a fresh, deployable Cohortly architecture with a real smart-link creation flow, public release pages, authentication, analytics event collection, fan and campaign insights, database schema, deployment plan and monetisation model. Inspect both old repositories for reusable code before discarding anything useful.
